original_reasoning: الآمص = طعام يتّخذ من لحم عجل بجلده (food made from calf meat with skin). λιμώσσω = to be hungry, starving, famished. Food and hunger are the two poles of the same nourishment concept — food is what hunger demands, hunger is the absence of food. This is a genuine conceptual pair: the object and its absence define each other.
امتلأ لحما preserves a strong receive/fill relation to taking into oneself.
wakhz=prick/stab with spear point; logchiazo=transfix with spear; both are piercing actions; clear semantic chain
Karbada (rushing in, hastening) vs Charybdis (swirling whirlpool) - shared swift rushing motion
Imitation of someone's act or form aligns with a habitual bodily state or manner.
Arabic dishevelment and spread can drift conceptually toward loosening or undoing, which fits Greek to loosen.
Exacting a debt and calculating it out share a credible settlement-accounting chain.

الصعصع=ranks displaced from positions, scattered apart (صفوفهم زالت عن مواقفها / ذهبوا صعاصع متفرقة). ἅλωσις=capture, conquest. Scattering of ranks is the RESULT of conquest/capture. Strong cause-effect semantic link in the military domain.
